arts.sum: A run down of the biggest transfer deadline day deals in the Eredivisie. Ajax Feyenoord PSV Eindhoven AZ Alkmaar Fortuna Sittard Go Ahead Eagles Heerenveen Heracles Almelo Sparta Rotterdam Twente Willem II RKC Waalwijk Almere City Groningen FC Utrecht NAC Breda PEC Zwolle NEC Nijmegen The post Eredivisie Transfer Deadline Day Round-Up appeared first on Football Oranje.

arts.ttl: Go Ahead Eagles find Edvardsen heir after striker moves to Ajax
arts.sum: Go Ahead Eagles have completed the signing of Norwegian forward Oskar Sivertsen (20) from Kristiansund BK as Oliver Edvardsen's successor.
